title: BioVault – Secure Biomedical Data Portal
problem: Healthcare systems lack secure and structured ways to manage sensitive biomedical data.
impact: Implemented role-based authentication and secure APIs, improving data access control and system reliability.

title: IngreGenius – Recipe Recommendation Platform
problem: Users struggle to find recipes using available ingredients.
impact: Built an API-driven filtering system that improves recipe discovery speed and user decision-making.
